titleStmt.title: SII 9.681: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 681. (A.R. No. 408 of 1920.) ON A STONE IN FRONT OF THE CHENNAKESAVA TEMPLE AT CHYABALA, GOOTY TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This damaged inscription whose date is lost refers itself to the reign of Sadāśivarāya. It records that, not capable of bearing the enhanced and numerous taxes, the people of the village Chebale had deserted it and that Daḷavāayi Appala-Nāyaka, the agent to Koṇḍayadēva-Mahā-arasu, to whom the district containing the village was given as amaramāgaṇi; invited the people and persuaded them to resettle in the village giving them some concessions. They were that they need not pay for three years to come sēnabōva-vartane, rāyasa-vartane, fees to royal servants, kāṇike, kaḍāya, cess on marriage and other domestic festivals, free work for the service of the god Henneyadēva and other imposts; that after three years such taxes as were current elsewhere would be justly levied; and that the rate of rent payable to the palace would be according to the quality of the soil.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
hana śakavarusa 14
ba 7 lu śrīmanmahārājādhirāja
śrīsadāśivarāyaru pruthvīrājyaṁgeyittalū śrīma(ṁ)nmahāma
ḍaiyadēvamahāarasugaḷige Amaramāgaṇige pālisida
ya pārupatyagāra daḷavāyappalanāyakanu cebaleya gauḍasēnabōvaru mu
prajegaḷige koṭa grāmada sāguvaḷiya śāsanada kramaveṁtteṁdare niṁma grāmau prāku Appalarājaga
Avanayagaḷāgi kilavāgi prajegaḷu biṭṭu grāmānugrāmagaḷige hōgiyiralāgi nāu Ā hōgiyida prajegaḷa
neya Aubhaḷadēvara saṁnidhiyalu naṁbugeyanu koṭu grāmava tuṁbisi sāguvaḷi koṭa vivara
madalu prāku haḷeya holake Ida vokalige palu 1 . Aramanege palu 1 Ubhayaṁ haḷeya
Eraḍuvare palu hostāgi maḍyaka hoḍada holakke vokkalige pālu 2 Aramanege pālu 1 Ubhaya
holakke pālu mūru Aramaneya Āya sāmmya puṁjya teruge haḷeya holakke yaraḍūvare
palige bāḷida bhattagaḷige sa 1 kke bhattavaḷi pratāpa gadyāṇa hoṁnu dharaṇa hosa holakke
ḷihola bhattagaḷige bhattavaḷi siṁmaga haṇa ga pujya yī mariyādeyali haḷeya hola hosa
gaḷanu pratipālisi naḍesibaheU keṁnelada guttige bījavari honnasari yaraḍu haṇau prāku
koḷaga lekhadalu keṁnelananū guttigeyāgi naḍesikoṁbeU kōra holadalū vakkalige baṁda
meḷepāla bhattagaḷige Adhikāriya bēḍike khaṁḍuga voṁdake yiṁmanada lekhadalu naḍasi
bāheU �yo tathātiti Ārabhya mūruvaruṣapariyaṁtaralu Aramaneya sēnabōvara varttane rāyasadavara
varttane Ūḷigadavara varttanekāṇike kaḍāya muṁjimaduvegaḷa Ulupe heṁneyadēvara biṭi sahavāgi Āvadū
yillade naḍasikoṁbeU mūruvarṣada mēle sīmeya kāṇike kaḍāya biṭi Āvadoṁdanu sīmeya bījavari prā
māṇadali niṁma grāmada bījavariya mēle naḍesikoṁbeU Ā koṁḍarājaya kōnēṭi rājagaḷa padadāṇe
yiṣṭake teppade naḍesikoṁbeU bhattavaḷiya rokkavanu hasigeya mēle tegedukoṁbeU Urva koṁḍe
ya sīmeya guttageyadare niṁma grāmavanu yi marriyadeyale kōrane naḍasibāheU śrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.681 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
